evidence_spans.span:
Maximum likelihood estimation uses the log-likelihood as its objective and selects a parameter value that maximizes it:

\[
\widehat{\theta}_{\mathrm{MLE}} = \operatorname*{arg\,max}_{\theta}\, \ell(\theta).
\]

results.rationale: The MLE Estimator formula explicitly defines the estimator as the argmax of the log-likelihood, thereby formalizing the log-likelihood as the objective function.
